name: Calendar
description: Core calendar module for Hecos. Stores, displays, and manages time-based events. Provides a shared datetime picker UI component, LLM tools, and REST API for other modules.

commands.add_event: Adds an event to the calendar.
commands.delete_event: Deletes a calendar event by ID.
commands.get_date_info: Gets current date context, including localized formatting and upcoming holidays.

function.name: CALENDAR__add_event
function.description: Adds a new event to the Hecos calendar. Use this when the user says 'add to calendar', 'schedule a meeting', 'remember that on [date]', 'crea un evento', 'segna sul calendario'. Accepts natural language dates.

title.description: Title/label of the event (e.g. 'Doctor appointment', 'Team standup', 'Dentist').

start.description: Start date/time in natural language or ISO format ('tomorrow at 10:00', 'next Monday at 14:30', '2026-06-01 09:00').

end.description: Optional: End date/time. If omitted, the event defaults to 1 hour duration.

all_day.description: If true, the event spans the full day with no specific time. Default: false.

notes.description: Optional: Additional notes or description for the event.

color.description: Optional: Color code for the event (e.g. '#3498db', 'red', 'green'). Defaults to the system accent color.

function.name: CALENDAR__list_events
function.description: Returns a formatted list of upcoming calendar events. Use when the user asks 'what do I have scheduled?', 'show my calendar', 'cosa ho sul calendario', 'eventi di questa settimana'.

n.description: Max number of events to return. Default: 10.

function.name: CALENDAR__delete_event
function.description: Deletes a calendar event. Use when the user says 'cancel that appointment', 'remove the event', 'elimina l'evento'. Ask for the event title or ID first using list_events if unsure.

event_id.description: The ID (full UUID or first 8 chars) of the event to delete.

function.name: CALENDAR__get_date_info
function.description: Returns robust temporal awareness containing the current date/time natively translated, checks if today is a public holiday, and lists upcoming public holidays in a specified country. Crucial for understanding relative dates ('il prossimo ponte', 'oggi è festa?', 'when is christmas?').

country.description: The ISO country code (e.g., 'IT' for Italy, 'US' for USA). Default: 'IT'.

year.description: Optional year to check holidays for. Defaults to current year.

slash_commands.description: Elenca i prossimi eventi nel calendario
